The '''Roxuli asteroids''' were [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoids]] in the [[Roxuli system/Legends|Roxuli system]].

==History==
They were [[Mining/Legends|mined]] by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] colonists. In [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], a dispute broke out between the colonists and the inhabitants of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Roxuli/Legends|Roxuli]] itself. [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] tricked [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] into abandoning the ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' (thereby sparing the life of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]) to negotiate between the two parties.

Roxuli and its [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field provided [[Ore/Legends|ore]] to half the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].

==Behind the scenes==
The novel [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] incorrectly places Roxuli in the [[Albanin sector/Legends|Albanin sector]] which is on the other side of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].
